transcript.text:
[Best beef tartare]
[Eating here today]
[It's because...]
[Check the visuals]
[And brisket?]
Cook the brisket and make a wrap
[Wrap meat with meat..?!]
[Delicious with delicious...]
[It's gotta be good]
[She's no joke]
[Film that]
[On paper]
[On the back]
[Front]
[Phone too?!]
[It's such a good day...]

Hello everyone
I'm here at Jongro today
To eat some raw beef
I've been told that there's a place here that has the best raw beef (beef tartare)
[Baekjae Jeongyuk Jeomp] [Seoul, Jongro-gu]
Another one here too
This place has been here for over 40 years
I've been told that this place gets so busy that both of these stores get packed with reservations
Let's head inside
Hello
It smells so good
[Today's menu]
Busy restaurants have everything ready before you get seated just like this place
The bell
What's most popular here?
They order the brisket and beef tartare together

They wrap the tartare with brisket
[Wrap them together...]
That sounds good Meat with meat
4 orders of beef tartare,
[No]
1 order is 500g, 2 servings
I eat a lot
I sound like I don't want to sell food, but it's not like that
4 plates of beef tartare, 1kg of brisket,
Special beef tartare bibimbap (mixed rice),
Soybean stew, liver & tripe dish too, please
[Okay let's see..]
[Checking the order again]
And...
Liver & tripe
Thank you

Order is in
[Lol]
[Food's here already?]
Thank you That was fast
Thank you
[This is a lot...]
Thank you
The beef tartare bibimbap
I've never seen it served this big It's a special size though
It's a mountain
Only this much rice
And the rest is beef
Liver & tripe here because I like it
Tripe, not really But I like liver
1kg of brisket
And beef tartare I heard these are good

You wrap these with cooked brisket
The restaurant is a full house already and it's not even 6 yet
Some liver first
The quality is nice
Tripe with some chojang (chili vinegar sauce)
It's gochujang (red chili paste)
I'll take these out
I can't eat these green chili peppers because they're spicy
[It's hard not being able to tolerate spicy foods]
Some tartare since it's so famous
Pop the egg yolk and mix
It's nice and cold
The sauce is delicious
A good amount of food at a low cost
The pear is really cold
The texture is nice

Very sweet tartare
Let's cook some meat
[Quiet...]
It doesn't sizzle because of the oil paper
It needs to have the sizzle though
I love these thin-cut meats because they cook fast It's the best
It's making a sound now
It's interesting that you wrap beef with beef
[Grab the brisket]
[Get the tartare]
You know how you burn yourself sometimes from the cooked meat?
It's not scorching hot if you eat it with this
This is really delicious
Put it on top like this
It tastes better when eaten together
Warm and cold food together...

Savory and sweet
The meat tastes unique together
[2nd round]
The brisket itself is really good too
It's good by itself too
This is so good I can't stop eating it like this
This is the best combo
Can't have this taste separately
So good
That juicy meat flavor from the brisket with cool, refreshing, and sweet tartare flavors
This is no joke
Some soybean stew too
Good by itself too
Some bibimbap now?
With lots of raw beef
I've never seen any place serve this much tartare in bibimbap Usually only this much

I'm too excited
[Can't blame you...]
It's tartare rice
[With brisket]
Brisket on top of tartare bibimbap,
And then some soybean stew
My mouth is full of happiness
[I won't miss it]
[3rd round]
I'm too lazy to unroll them They'll do it on their own
[As long as it tastes good]
Wrap it again?
[She is losing her mind...]
It's sweet and the sauce makes it delicious
[1 plate cleared]
[Onto the next]

I'm just eating without much thought again
All the restaurants are good
Quick, more
[4th round] No time to waste
This combination is a must Not okay separately
Bibimbap with brisket
[Kimchi too]
This combo is really good too
Meat on top, mushroom on top,
Onions too
Is that too big?
[Why even worry?]
So good
More mushrooms That's really good
Good with onions too
Best combination

The restaurant is big, but it's packed
[A restaurant with good food]
[She looks so ready]
It's so sweet and delicious
It's the best
A lot on top
[+Brisket]
[+Gochujang]
[+Onions]
Potatoes
How should I eat it?
It's cooked so well
Tartare and potatoes?
Sounds weird, but let's try it
[This doesn't look right...]
That's so good

Really good
I can't really express this
Potato gratin
With mixed... raw beef...
How do I say this?
It's good
Just like this would be good too
Cook more potatoes
Tartare mixed rice or just tartare rice?
This should be good with potatoes too
[Put the rest in]
Half beef half rice
Mostly beef
It's really good, but it's really cost-efficient
[Brisket+Tartare] [100g for 9,000 Won (~$7.12 USD)]
[5th round]

[Cooking the brisket]
[Spoon to the rescue]
Old people tend to come to restaurants with really good food
This restaurant is giving off that vibe
It'll be hard for you to just walk past this restaurant
[You guys stay over here]
[What is this?]
The bone broth soup here is self-serve
Free refills
This is it
Lovely
I dropped my phone but it's not important
This is more important
[So much love for the brisket]
Meat, potatoes,
Mushrooms

The brisket needs to be hot when wrapping the tartare
You won't get this taste if it's cold
[3rd plate going in~]
This guy is a true fan of yours
[That's me]
[Photo time]
[Satisfied]
[And that started...]
[A real photo time]
[Thank you for watching my content]
Thank you
I'm thankful And embarrassed
Last piece of meat
I'm good at balancing it out Even if I don't try to
[A perfect ratio]
Didn't this happen to me before? I'm sure it has

But I don't remember when
[A fan came for an autograph]
[Getting an autograph from Player Tzuyang]
[This is too funny]
I've never seen him this happy
Hello Tzuyang~!
Can I get one here too?
[Autograph on his K2 shirt]
[Thank you for your continuous support]
Over here?
[Today is such a good day]
They give you a lot of beef tartare
[1kg of brisket cleared]
[Beef tartare bibimbap cleared]
[Last bit of tartare]
Put it like this for the last bite

You're much prettier in person
-Way prettier -Really?
Please include that in the video
[Cleared everything]
I had such a great meal today
It was great to see everyone enjoy watching me eating
So I had a better experience than usual
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
